name: Evernight
desc: In the Memory Zone secluded from the world, candlelight reflects the past, silently extinguishing in the mist.\nEvernight, child of Remembrance emerging from those shadows, the Chrysos Heir who conceals the Coreflame of "Time," raises the waves of "Oblivion" to protect the wishes of those in the mirror\n"Don't worry, I will guard the path of Trailblaze for you... at any cost. ♭"

1.name: Sleep Tight, the Night Dreams Long
1.desc: When Evernight is on the field, if there are (≥4)/3/2/1 enemy targets on the field, ally memosprites deal DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> of their original DMG respectively.

2.name: Listen Up, the Slumber Speaks Soft
2.desc: Increases Evernight's and the memosprite Evey's CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>. Each time Evernight gains "Memoria," increases the amount of "Memoria" gain by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> point(s). When using Ultimate, additionally gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Charge for "Darkest Riddle."

3.name: Fear Not, the Nightmare Lies Past
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.\nMemosprite Talent Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Wake Up, the Tomorrow is Yours
4.desc: While Evernight is on the field, ally memosprites' Weakness Break Efficiency increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, and the memosprite Evey's Weakness Break Efficiency additionally increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

5.name: Let Go, the "Me" in Memories
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nMemosprite Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Like This, Always
6.desc: While Evernight is on the field, all ally targets' All-Type <u>RES PEN</u> increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. After the memosprite Evey uses "Dream, Dissolving, as Dew," Evernight gains <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the amount of "Memoria" consumed in this attack.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

141301.name: Time Thence Blurs
141301.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Evernight's Max HP to one designated enemy.
141301.simple_desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to one designated enemy.

141302.name: Day Gently Slips
141302.desc: Consumes <unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak> of Evernight's current HP to <u>summon memosprite</u> Evey and increases CRIT DMG of all ally memosprites by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Evernight's CRIT DMG for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 at the start of Evernight's every turn. If Evey is already on the field, restores its HP by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> of its Max HP. When using this, gains <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "Memoria." If in the "Darkest Riddle" state, gains <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> additional point(s) of "Memoria."
141302.simple_desc: Consumes this unit's HP to <u>summon memosprite</u> Evey and <color=#f29e38ff>increase CRIT DMG for all ally memosprites</color>. If Evey is already on the field, restores its HP. When using this, <color=#f29e38ff>gains <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> "Memoria."</color> If in the "Darkest Riddle" state, additionally <color=#f29e38ff>gains <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> "Memoria."</color>

10000018.name: Summon Memosprite
10000018.desc: Summon the memosprite to the field. If the memosprite is already on the field, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs the memosprite is afflicted with.

141303.name: O Wakeful World, Goodnight
141303.desc: <u>Summons memosprite</u> Evey. Then Evey deals Ice DMG to all enemies equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Evey's Max HP and Evernight enters the "Darkest Riddle" state. During this state, all enemies take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> increased DMG while both Evernight and Evey deal <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> increased DMG and are immune to <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u>. Gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> point(s) of Charge for "Darkest Riddle." And Evey consumes 1 point after it uses "Dream, Dissolving, as Dew." At the start of Evernight's turn, if no Charge remains, exits the "Darkest Riddle" state.
141303.simple_desc: Deals Ice DMG to all enemies. <u>Summons memosprite</u> Evey and causes Evernight to enter the "Darkest Riddle" state, during which enemies take increased DMG and both Evernight and her memosprite deal increased DMG and are immune to <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u>.

10000011.name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominance, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock, Happiness Puppet, Grudge Ablaze.

10000018.name: Summon Memosprite
10000018.desc: Summon the memosprite to the field. If the memosprite is already on the field, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs the memosprite is afflicted with.

141304.name: With Me, This Night
141304.desc: When entering combat, <u>summons memosprite</u> Evey. Evey has an initial SPD of <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> and its Max HP equals to <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> of that of Evernight's. Each time Evernight or Evey loses HP, increases CRIT DMG for Evernight and Evey by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s), and gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> "Memoria." This effect can trigger only once per target for each received attack.\nWhen Evernight has <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> or more points of "Memoria," dispels <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> and becomes immune to them. If Evey is on the field, it immediately takes action. The immediate action effect can only trigger again after Evey uses "Dream, Dissolving, as Dew."
141304.simple_desc: When entering combat, <u>summons memosprite</u> Evey. Each time this unit or Evey <color=#f29e38ff>loses HP</color>, <color=#f29e38ff>increases CRIT DMG for this unit and Evey</color>, and <color=#f29e38ff>gains "Memoria."</color>\nWhen Evernight has <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color> or more "Memoria," Evey immediately takes action.

10000011.name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominance, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock, Happiness Puppet, Grudge Ablaze.

10000018.name: Summon Memosprite
10000018.desc: Summon the memosprite to the field. If the memosprite is already on the field, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs the memosprite is afflicted with.

141306.name: Attack
141306.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

141307.name: Let it Rain Cold On Thee
141307.desc: After using Technique, at the start of the next battle, obtains the same effect as the one from Skill that increases CRIT DMG for all ally memosprites, and gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> "Memoria."
141307.simple_desc: At the start of the next battle, obtains the same effect as the one from Skill that increases memosprite CRIT DMG, and additionally gains "Memoria."

141309.name: Day Gently Slips
141309.simple_desc: Consumes this unit's HP to <u>summon memosprite</u> Evey and <color=#f29e38ff>increase CRIT DMG for all ally memosprites</color>. If Evey is already on the field, restores its HP. When using this, <color=#f29e38ff>gains <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> "Memoria."</color> If in the "Darkest Riddle" state, additionally <color=#f29e38ff>gains <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> "Memoria."</color>

1.point_name: Dark the Night, Still the Moon
1.point_desc: Increases Evernight's and the memosprite Evey's CRIT Rate by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When using an ability, consumes <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of this unit's current HP to increase CRIT DMG for both of them by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s). After Evey uses "Dream, Dissolving, as Dew," recovers 1 Skill Point for allies.

1.point_name: Rouse the Flame, Lull the Light
1.point_desc: When combat starts, Evernight regenerates <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Energy and gains <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> "Memoria." When Evernight or an ally memosprite uses an ability, Evernight regenerates <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Energy and gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> "Memoria."

1.point_name: Kindle the Morn, Drop the Rain
1.point_desc: When there are 1/2/3/≥4 Remembrance characters in the team, increases CRIT DMG for all ally memosprites by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> respectively while Evernight's Skill lasts.

1141301.name: Remembrance, Whirling, Like Rain
1141301.desc: This ability automatically selects a target, prioritizing the enemy target that Evernight last attacked. Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Evey's Max HP to one enemy. For every <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "Memoria" Evernight currently has, additionally deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Evey's Max HP. Gains <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "Memoria" after use.
1141301.simple_desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to one enemy and further deals minor Ice DMG based on the amount of "Memoria."

1141303.name: Solitude, Drifting, In Murk
1141303.desc: Evey is immune to <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> and has an increased chance of getting attacked. While Evey is on the field, Evernight and Evey deal <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> increased DMG.
1141303.simple_desc: The memosprite Evey is immune to <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u>, and its chance of getting attacked increases. While it's on the field, increases its own and Evernight's DMG dealt.

10000011.name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominance, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock, Happiness Puppet, Grudge Ablaze.

1141305.name: Night, Trailing, In Step
1141305.desc: When summoned, this unit immediately takes action.
1141305.simple_desc: When summoned, this unit immediately takes action.

1141306.name: You, Parting, Beyond Reach
1141306.desc: Upon disappearing, increases Evernight's SPD by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. If the disappearance is due to using "Dream, Dissolving, as Dew," then, for every 1 "Memoria" point consumed by the attack, additionally increases Evernight's SPD by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. Up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> "Memoria" points can be taken into account for this. The SPD Boost effect cannot stack and is removed at the start of Evernight's next turn.

1141307.name: Dream, Dissolving, as Dew
1141307.desc: This ability is used when Evernight's "Memoria" is greater than or equal to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> and she is not affected by Crowd Control. For every 1 "Memoria" point currently held, deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Evey's Max HP to the primary target, and Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Evey's Max HP to the other enemy targets. After use, consumes all "Memoria" and HP, and makes Evey disappear.
1141307.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Based on the amount of "Memoria"</color>, deals massive Ice DMG to the primary target and Ice DMG to the other enemy targets. After use, <color=#f29e38ff>consumes all "Memoria" and HP, and makes Evey disappear</color>.
